stories.title: The biggest remaining roster hole for every NFL te...
stories.summary: Even after free agency, trades and the draft, NFL teams still have at least one position that needs a boost. Here's one for every roster.

stories.title: Who is on the hot seat after the draft? 14 veteran...
stories.summary: Could Xavier Legette lose snaps to Chris Brazzell II in Carolina? Will Carrington Valentine get jumped by Brandon Cisse on the Green Bay depth chart?

stories.title: Haslam wants Giannis' future settled before draft
stories.summary: Bucks co-owner Jimmy Haslam says he would like to have Giannis Antetokounmpo's future sorted out before next month's NBA draft.

stories.title: Finch: Wolves 'got punked' in 38-point blowout
stories.summary: The Timberwolves, despite a warning from superstar Anthony Edwards, could not keep pace with the recharged Spurs in Wednesday night's Game 2.

stories.title: Players Era Championships expands to 24 teams
stories.summary: Players Era, the EverWonder Studio company behind the November tournament, and ESPN have reached a multiyear agreement for ESPN to serve as the exclusive broadcast partner for the Players Era Men's Championships. The event is also expanding to 24 teams.
